title: Relation to Electronic Signatures in Global and National Commerce Act
doc_html:
§4251.502. Relation to Electronic Signatures in Global and National Commerce Act

            This Chapter modifies, limits, and supersedes the federal Electronic Signatures in Global and National Commerce Act, 15 U.S.C. Section 7001, et seq., but does not modify, limit, or supersede Section 101(c) of that act, 15 U.S.C. Section 7001(c), or authorize electronic delivery of any of the notices described in Section 103(b) of that act, 15 U.S.C. Section 7003(b).

            Acts 2016, No. 333, §1.
doc_text:
§4251.502.  Relation to Electronic Signatures in Global and National Commerce Act
This Chapter modifies, limits, and supersedes the federal Electronic Signatures in
Global and National Commerce Act, 15 U.S.C. Section 7001, et seq., but does not modify,
limit, or supersede Section 101(c) of that act, 15 U.S.C. Section 7001(c), or authorize
electronic delivery of any of the notices described in Section 103(b) of that act, 15 U.S.C.
Section 7003(b).
Acts 2016, No. 333, §1.
